data.headline: Careers & Subcontractors at BuiltWell CT
data.subheadline: We are looking for skilled tradespeople and subcontractors who take their work seriously. Fair pay, steady work, local projects across Fairfield and New Haven Counties.

data.title: Why Work With Us
data.content: BuiltWell CT maintains a 3 to 4 month project backlog across Fairfield and New Haven Counties, offering subcontractors in 8 trade categories steady local work with fair pay and no overnight travel.

cards.title: Steady Work
cards.description: We book 3 to 4 months out consistently. No feast-or-famine scheduling.

cards.title: Fair Pay, On Time
cards.description: Pay is fair and paid on schedule. No complicated arrangements or delayed settlements.

cards.title: Local Projects
cards.description: Fairfield County and New Haven County only. No long drives, no overnight travel.

cards.title: Respect
cards.description: Owner-operated. Decisions happen fast, problems get addressed directly. You are treated as a professional.

data.title: Who We Work With
data.content: BuiltWell CT partners with skilled tradespeople in 8 categories including finish carpenters, tile setters, flooring installers, painters, electricians, plumbers, project leads, and general laborers across Connecticut.
data.footer_note: If your trade is not listed, reach out anyway. We are always willing to talk to someone who fits how we operate.

data.title: Submit Your Application
data.content: BuiltWell CT reviews every subcontractor application personally within 48 hours. The 4-step form takes about two minutes and covers your trade, experience, contact info, and recent project photos.
